name: Wind Spire
notes: Windy Peaks only — sits on Hill tiles, the same terrain exception Wind Sanctuary gets. A Turret variant (see "extends") trading raw damage for crowd control and anti-air specialization: low base damage, but a strong knockback on every hit (statusEffectOnHit.type: "knockback", magnitude in hexes pushed — a new status-effect type, distinct from freeze/stun, with no chance field since it always applies) plus a large damageDealtModifiers.Air bonus. Longer range than a base Turret, reflecting the hilltop vantage.
